title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Mastery Check
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.typescript:
// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.
// Add one typed behavior, runtime boundary, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: Module Resolution · changed case
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Package @learn/status-3 exports one ESM runtime function and one public type through package exports. Verify Node resolution, declaration lookup, type-only import erasure, and failure from an unexported internal path.

Which action demonstrates Module Resolution without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose bundler or nodenext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
